---
title: "Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions."
description: "Robin Lovelace (2008). Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions.. *Nature*."
date: "2008-09-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_energy_2008"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Nature"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://dx.doi.org/10.1038/455461a"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This commentary addresses the limitations of relying solely on technological efficiency improvements to achieve climate targets. It highlights the importance of systemic shifts and behavioral change in energy consumption."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Nature
**Year:** 2008

[URL](http://dx.doi.org/10.1038/455461a) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This commentary addresses the limitations of relying solely on technological efficiency improvements to achieve climate targets. It highlights the importance of systemic shifts and behavioral change in energy consumption.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2008). Energy: Efficiency gains alone won’t reduce emissions.. *Nature*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_energy_2008,
	title = {Energy: efficiency gains alone won't reduce emissions.},
	volume = {455},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	issn = {1476-4687},
	shorttitle = {Nature},
	url = {http://dx.doi.org/10.1038/455461a},
	abstract = {This commentary addresses the limitations of relying solely on technological efficiency improvements to achieve climate targets. It highlights the importance of systemic shifts and behavioral change in energy consumption.},
	number = {7212},
	journal = {Nature},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	month = sep,
	year = {2008},
	pages = {460},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
